records.question: Which aircraft have recorded flights with a price at least 425.98, an origin exactly 'Los Angeles', and a distance at most 2551, and that also have associated certificates?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aid FROM aircraft
JOIN flight ON aircraft.aid = flight.aid
JOIN certificate ON aircraft.aid = certificate.aid
WHERE flight.price >= 425.98 AND flight.origin = 'Los Angeles' AND flight.distance <= 2551
records.pred_sql: select distinct aircraft.aid from aircraft join flight on aircraft.aid = flight.aid join certificate on aircraft.aid = certificate.aid where flight.price >= 425.98 and flight.origin = 'Los Angeles' and flight.distance <= 2551 limit 5;
records.thought: We need aircraft that have flights matching the price, origin, and distance criteria, and also have at least one associated certificate. We'll join aircraft with flight and certificate, apply the filters, and select distinct aircraft.aid.

records.question: Which aircraft named Embraer ERJ-145 have both flight and certificate information?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aid FROM aircraft
JOIN flight ON aircraft.aid = flight.aid
JOIN certificate ON aircraft.aid = certificate.aid
WHERE aircraft.name = 'Embraer ERJ-145'
records.pred_sql: select distinct aircraft.aid from aircraft join flight on aircraft.aid = flight.aid join certificate on aircraft.aid = certificate.aid where lower(aircraft.name) like '%embraer erj-145%' limit 5;
records.thought: We need aircraft named 'Embraer ERJ-145' that have related records in both flight and certificate tables. We'll join aircraft with flight and certificate, filter by name, and select distinct aircraft.aid.

records.question: Which Boeing 747-400 aircraft with a distance of 8430 flew from Los Angeles to Washington D.C. arriving at 04/12/2005 09:40 on a flight costing at most 235.98 and covering no more than 2308 miles?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aid FROM aircraft
JOIN flight ON aircraft.aid = flight.aid
WHERE flight.destination = 'Washington D.C.' AND flight.price <= 235.98 AND flight.distance <= 2308 AND flight.origin = 'Los Angeles' AND aircraft.name = 'Boeing 747-400' AND flight.arrival_date = '04/12/2005 09:40' AND aircraft.distance = 8430
records.pred_sql: select aircraft.aid from aircraft join flight on aircraft.aid = flight.aid where lower(aircraft.name) like '%boeing 747-400%' and aircraft.distance = 8430 and lower(flight.origin) like '%los angeles%' and lower(flight.destination) like '%washington d.c.%' and flight.arrival_date = '04/12/2005 09:40' and flight.price <= 235.98 and flight.distance <= 2308 limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find aircraft with name like 'boeing 747-400' and distance = 8430, joined with flights from Los Angeles to Washington D.C., arriving at the specified date, with price <= 235.98 and distance <= 2308.

records.question: Which aircraft named Airbus A320 can travel at most 2605 miles and are certified to an employee named George Wright who earns at least 289950?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aid FROM aircraft
JOIN certificate ON aircraft.aid = certificate.aid
JOIN employee ON certificate.eid = employee.eid
WHERE aircraft.name = 'Airbus A320' AND aircraft.distance <= 2605 AND employee.salary >= 289950 AND employee.name = 'George Wright'
records.pred_sql: select aircraft.aid from aircraft join certificate on aircraft.aid = certificate.aid join employee on certificate.eid = employee.eid where lower(aircraft.name) like '%airbus a320%' and aircraft.distance <= 2605 and lower(employee.name) like '%george wright%' and employee.salary >= 289950 limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find aircraft named 'Airbus A320' with a distance <= 2605, certified to employees named 'George Wright' with salary >= 289950. This requires joining aircraft, certificate, and employee tables.

records.question: Which aircraft named Piper Archer III flew from Los Angeles to Honolulu on 04/12/2005 09:15 covering a distance of at most 2551 miles?

JOIN flight ON aircraft.aid = flight.aid
